text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I'm at an amusement park on a day<n>off, when...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Roll, roll, roller coaster! Amusement<n>parks are the
best!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wowie. You're really happy today,<n>huh, El?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Spe! Are you ready?! We're about to<n>have the
time of our lives!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Haha! It just hit me! You're feeling<n>pretty down,
aren't ya?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! Do you have psychic<n>abilities?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
To tell you the truth... I can't sing or<n>dance very
well, so I don't feel very<n>confident about winning
concerts.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And the council president told me to<n>think about
why we have winning<n>concerts in the first place.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Why... why... How am I supposed to<n>know why?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
...Sounds like you're missing<n>something
important. Don't worry, I'll<n>show you how to
make a grand<n>entrance!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: C'mon, let's go! To the scream<n>machine!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? The s-scream machine?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A few minutes later, I hear Special<n>Week's faint
screams carried on the<n>wind.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... I think I saw the Three Goddesses back there...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Well, Spe?! Did you figure it out yet?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That was amazing! Amusement parks<n>are so
cool! They're almost as great<n>as a box full of
potatoes!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. Then let's choose our last<n>ride. There are
two choices!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The longest, greatest, most<n>screamworthy roller
coaster in the<n>world! Or... the teacups!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
A roller coaster or teacups? That's<n>like choosing
between super spicy<n>and super sweet!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh, well put.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Well, then... You there! Our fates rest<n>in your
hands!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
What should our last ride be? The<n>world's
longest roller coaster?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Or the teacups? The choice is yours!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Mom! I... I'm going to try my best!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah! Hah! AAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Special Week's screams last the<n>entire length of
the world's longest<n>roller coaster!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh! They're so cute!<n>There's no way I
can't handle this!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, you're sweet as sugar and<n>just as
innocent. But life is like a box<n>of jalapenos!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa spins the cup with all<n>her might,
leaving Special Week<n>completely dizzy.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... My head keeps spinning... But<n>that was...
so... fun!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: There are so many fun rides here,it's like the park itself wants usto have fun!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You get it now.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
My papi's a pro wrestler. He always<n>told me to
be like an amusement park!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We may be athletes, but we must<n>never forget
our guests!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Same thing goes for winning concerts.<n>Can you
be like an amusement park?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'm going to be a roller<n>coaster!
